download.title: Download Minecraft
download.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel the download?

onboarding.choose_language_desc: Please select your preferred language. Once finished, click "Next" to continue.
onboarding.welcome_desc: Welcome to SimpMC Launcher! Let's get you set up quickly.
onboarding.install_minecraft_desc: You can choose to install Minecraft after completing this setup wizard.
onboarding.wardrobe_setup_desc: Manage your character skins and outfits with the wardrobe feature.
onboarding.create_character_desc: Please create your game profile. You can choose Offline, Third-party, or Microsoft authentication. Click "Next" to continue.
onboarding.setup_complete_desc:
Congratulations! SimpMC Launcher is ready to go.

Start your adventure now!

auth.microsoft_email_required: Please sign in to your Microsoft account first

slogan.morning: A brand new day begins! Time to sparkle and make it amazing! Keep it up~
slogan.midmorning: The sun is perfect right now. How about a sweet juice break before we continue?
slogan.noon: Tummy rumbles... Your stomach is protesting! Let's go grab a treat, okay?
slogan.afternoon: Yawns... Feeling a little sleepy? Maybe a short nap before your next adventure?
slogan.dusk: The sunset is glowing on the window. You've worked hard today, welcome back!
slogan.evening: It's late, but our story is just getting started. Shall we dim the lights a bit?
slogan.night: The moon is high in the sky! Let's build something magical under the gentle starlight.

settings.title: Settings
settings.download_settings_desc: Manage game installation directory, download concurrency, and max retries
settings.personalization_desc: Customize launcher appearance and display settings
settings.profile_management_desc: Add, edit, or delete game profiles
settings.language_desc: Change the language of the application interface
settings.display_name_desc: Set the name shown in the home greeting, default is the local username.
settings.music_hint:
Place music files in the SimpMC/music directory.
In the launcher, press Ctrl + scroll wheel to adjust the volume quickly.
settings.install_path_hint: Minecraft versions and resources will be installed in this directory
settings.download_source_hint: BMCLAPI source is faster in China
settings.concurrent_downloads_hint: Higher concurrency downloads faster, but may cause download failures
settings.max_retries_hint: Number of times to automatically retry failed downloads

profile.title: Manage Profiles
profile.empty: No profiles yet, please add a new one

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.name: Name
wardrobe.skin_preview_hint: Drag and drop to rotate the skin, name will be saved automatically.

info.title: Discovery Page
info.description: This page will showcase community content, recommended resources, and latest updates. Feature under development, stay tuned!

versions.title: Version Management
versions.download_hint: Click the button above to download a version and start playing
versions.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete version {version}? This action cannot be undone.

music.float_window_disabled: Music floating window feature is disabled.
